title: Sylvan: New Beginning
description: Sylvan: New Beginning is a modpack centered around making Minecraft feel more authentic and more fun, without adding unnecessary mods that look out of place.
body:
# Sylvan: New Beginning

![Created by CPlusPatch](https://cdn-web.cpluspatch.com/created_by_cpluspatch.svg) ![Available for Fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)  ![Available on Modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg) ![See me on GitHub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/social/github-singular_vector.svg) ![Chat with me on Matrix](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/social/matrix-singular_vector.svg)

## Philosophy

I created this modpack as a simple creation for enhancing the beautiful game, by ameliorating its good parts and stripping out its bad parts: nevertheless, numerous content mods are added, so long as they either fully use vanilla blocks or add in elements that fit in to the game's style.

I believe in having fun more than gritty realism and adding content. Included with this modpack are popular content mods such as:
- **Create Fabric** (with some addons such as the [Create: Interactive](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactive) mod to enhance the contraptions system)
- **Terralith**, with **Amplified Nether** and various worldgen modifications to make exploration more fun
  - This includes the full suite of **Yung's Better Minecraft** mods, which fundamentally revamp the aged default Minecraft structures into things of beauty
- **Valkyrien Skies 2**, a mod that lets you transform Minecraft blocks and Create contraptions into full physics machines even capable of flight

However, the main strength of this pack is in the numerous **Quality-Of-Life** mods. Some of them are aimed at removing frustrating parts of gameplay, such as **Forgiving Void** (when falling into the void, the player teleports back to the top of the map and lands safely if they were at full health), while some like **Visuality**, **Better Command Block UI**, **Screenshot to Keyboard** and **Visual Workbench** exist to better smaller parts of the game in general.

## Screenshots

Check out [the gallery](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sylvan/gallery) for some pictures! All photos were taken with the [**Rethinking Voxels**](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) shader.

## Performance

Sylvan bundles many performance mods and fixes in its releases, ensuring that even the weakest hardware has a chance at running the game playably.

## Installation

This project recommends the [Prism Launcher project](https://prismlauncher.org/) for easy installation and updating of all mods. Plus, Prism is fully open-source, lightweight, and available on macOS, Windows and every Linux distribution (via Flatpak, AppImage or native packages).
